title: I Heard It Through the Grapevine
why_this_song: I Heard It Through the Grapevine by Marvin Gaye (1968) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Heard it through the grapevine"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Heard it through the grapevine"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Heard it through the grapevine"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Honey, honey yeah"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Not much longer would you be mine"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Not much longer would you be mine
Oh I heard it through the grapevine
Oh I'm just about to lose my mind
(Not much longer would you be my baby, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
People say believe half of what you see, son
And none of what you hear

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heard" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heard" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "through" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "through" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ooh, I bet you're wonderin' how I knew
But these tears I can't hold inside
If it's true please tell me dear

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Bout your plans to make me blue
Oh I heard it through the grapevine

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I Heard It Through the Grapevine" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I Heard It Through the Grapevine"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Marvin Gaye one question about "I Heard It Through the Grapevine", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Marvin Gaye sobre "I Heard It Through the Grapevine", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "I Heard It Through the Grapevine" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "I Heard It Through the Grapevine" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
